since_last: 25% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.24%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 25% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.65% · BTC -0.78% · Gold -1.58% · Nasdaq100 -1.82%. 25% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.24%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.24%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.69%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -11.44%
cards.body: Leaders: INTU +5.45%, AVAV +5.33%, ADBE +4.74%, ZBRA +3.91%, IBM +3.83%. Laggards: SKHY -11.44%, CRNC -10.26%, SMR -9.39%, RXRX -9.37%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.17% at $132.33
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.17% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
